summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented. REQ-1 is addressed via index.css CSS custom property updates for light/dark themes and explicit inline color styles in ResumePreview.tsx. REQ-2 is addressed via a new useDownloadImage hook and a 'Download as Image' button in App.tsx's sticky header. The implementation uses an SVG foreignObject approach instead of html2canvas, but achieves the same DOM-to-canvas capture goal. Profile photo handling is included. The download is triggered automatically as 'resume.png'. No hallucinated features were found beyond the scope of the requirements.
